headline: Corsair’s PC case with a panoramic glass design is $70 off
summary: Corsair's Frame 4500X RS PC case is now $70 off. It features a panoramic glass design and versatile component support. Available for $119.99 at Amazon, Best Buy, and Corsair.

headline: Tesla’s robotaxi promises are clashing with reality
summary: Elon Musk presented a more tempered outlook on Tesla's robotaxi program during an earnings call. Despite new cities and more miles driven, concerns about unsupervised vehicles persist. Musk's usual bullishness was notably absent from the discussion.

headline: Geekbench 7 will push your computer or phone even harder for better benchmarking
summary: Primate Labs releases Geekbench 7, the latest version of its benchmarking tool. It introduces new video/audio encoding tests and a redesigned multi-core test. Expect more demanding datasets for CPUs and GPUs.

headline: OpenAI is making big claims as it rolls out ChatGPT Health to everyone
summary: OpenAI is launching ChatGPT Health to all US users, allowing medical record integration. The company claims its models now reason better than clinicians. This rollout marks a significant expansion into healthcare AI.

headline: Today’s Top Deals: Metaphor: ReFantazio, Logitech G29 Racing Wheel, and G PRO X Superlight 2 Mouse
summary: Discover top deals on games like Metaphor: ReFantazio. Logitech G29 Racing Wheel and G PRO X Superlight 2 Mouse are heavily discounted. Plus, find cheaper Pokémon TCG - Pitch Black on Amazon.

headline: The Steam Deck's Demand Has Reportedly Cratered
summary: Reports suggest a significant decline in Steam Deck demand. This indicates a potential shift in the portable PC gaming market. Further details on sales and user interest are emerging.

headline: King of the Hill Cast and Showrunner Reveal the Secret Origin of the Season 15 Finale
summary: The King of the Hill cast and showrunner discussed the Season 15 finale's origins. They revealed Hank's major Strickland Propane twist. The episode also included a touching tribute to Lucky and Luanne.

headline: Save $1,500 Off an Alienware Area-51 Ryzen X3D Gaming PC With RTX 5090 GPU and 64GB of RAM
summary: Get a massive $1,500 discount on an Alienware Area-51 Ryzen X3D Gaming PC. This powerful rig includes an RTX 5090 GPU and 64GB of RAM. It's a competitive price for an extremely high-end gaming machine.

headline: Oil prices hit $100 for the first time since May
summary: Brent crude oil prices surged over 6% on Thursday. This pushed prices to $100 per barrel, a first since May. Escalating Middle East conflict is cited as the primary driver.

headline: Saudis must recognise Israel for nuclear deal, says Trump
summary: Donald Trump stated Saudi Arabia's nuclear energy deal hinges on recognizing Israel. The landmark agreement requires the Saudis to join the Abraham Accords. This links advanced energy cooperation to diplomatic normalization.

headline: Haigh, Rayner and Powell likely to regularly work from No 10 North
summary: Key figures Haigh, Rayner, and Powell are expected to work regularly from No 10 North. A think tank's blueprint suggests up to 300 staff there within 18 months. This indicates a significant decentralization of government operations.

headline: Rayner rules out repaying severance cash after making cabinet return
summary: Angela Rayner has refused to repay her severance cash following her return to cabinet. She received £16,876 after leaving government in September 2025. The returning housing secretary maintains her stance on the payment.
